title: Uncraftables Plus
body:
--- ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6233b936b2a7d3c7dd511fe8888df6874001f050_0.webp) **Uncraftables+** lets you craft items that are normally uncraftable in Minecraft like the **Elytra**, **Name Tag**, **Saddle**, and more. **Note:** This mod is in **work-in-progress (WIP)**. More recipes will be added soon! --- # **FAQs**
How do I install the datapack? 1. Place the datapack file in your Minecraft world’s `datapacks` folder. 2. Load the world and you're done!
**Note:** You only need to install either the datapack or the mod no need to install both.
How do I install the mod? 1. Download the `.jar` file. 2. Put it in your `mods` folder. 3. Start the game.
Which items are currently craftable? * **Saddle** * **Bell** * **Name Tag** * **Elytra** * **Horse Armor (Iron, Gold, Diamond)** * **Enchanted Golden Apple** * **Totem of Undying** * **Bottle o’ Enchanting** * **Cobweb** * **Trident** * **Chainmail Armor (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots)** * **Heart of the Sea**
Can I change recipes? Yes! But if you're using the **datapack** version: * Go to `data/minecraft/recipe` * Edit the `.json` recipe files as you like * Reload the game (or use `/reload`)
Are more recipes coming? Yes, many more are planned for future updates. Stay tuned!
--- ### Have an idea for a recipe? Feel free to DM me on Discord at **rijz.gg**, I’d love to hear your suggestions! ---
